title: EZBanks
body:
**Remember, this is the first alpha of the plugin it does not contain all functions yet! If you find any bugs please let me know on GitHub.**


Very simple Bank system.

The plugin requires Vault and an Economy plugin.
MYSQL and SQL support

## Functions:
- Unique card system
- Buy a new card if it gets lost (price customizable in config)
- Transfer money to other accounts with their bank id
- Depositing and withdrawing money to the bank account
- Transaction log to see who steal ur money :P
- Bedrock Support (need Floodgate to run probaply)

## Comamnds:
- /bank - Open the bank GUI
- /setpin - Change ur card pin
- /bank-suspend - Command to suspend/unsuspend bank accounts (Permission:
ezbank.bank.suspend)

Since the money is not stored on the player like with any other bank plugin, but is stored on the card, anyone who has the card and the pin has access to the account (u can change the pin in the command or with /setpin).
